$comment: Placeholder work behind the source-agnostic data layer. Each project has a serviceFamily (one of the taxonomy ids) + discipline tags + an optional per-project accent. Images are CORS-clean Unsplash (auto=format → WebP/AVIF; {w}/{h} filled by src/images.ts) so the WebGL hero can texture them. Swap VITE_CMS_SOURCE to source from a real CMS; adding work = a new entry here, no code.
